mapper.select: SELECT user_id, tenant_id, tenant_display_name, tenant_locale, roles_json::text AS roles_json, location_scopes_json::text AS location_scopes_json, partner_scopes_json::text AS partner_scopes_json FROM tenant_memberships WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tenant_id

SELECT user_id, tenant_id, tenant_display_name, tenant_locale, roles_json::text AS roles_json, location_scopes_json::text AS location_scopes_json, partner_scopes_json::text AS partner_scopes_json FROM tenant_memberships WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_memberships ( id, user_id, tenant_id, tenant_display_name, tenant_locale, roles_json, location_scopes_json, partner_scopes_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{row.userId}, #{row.tenantId}, #{row.tenantDisplayName}, #{row.tenantLocale}, #{row.rolesJson}::jsonb, #{row.locationScopesJson}::jsonb, #{row.partnerScopesJson}::jsonb )
